### Testing

How were these changes tested?

### Checklist

- [ ] Clippy clean (`cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`)
- [ ] Formatted (`cargo fmt --all -- --check`)

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
